commands.review_summary:
The branch updates `mergeOrigin` to clear `nativeChannelId`, `nativeDirectUserId`, `accountId`, and `threadId` on provider or surface switches and adds channel-switch regression coverage through `deriveSessionMetaPatch`.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current and released `mergeOrigin` preserve omitted native origin fields, Slack can seed `NativeChannelId`, and Telegram direct-message contexts omit it. I did not run a live two-transport repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the canonical same-root PR and confirm the persisted session-origin reset contract; contributor-side real behavior proof is also still needed before merge.
